checklist.description: Place the extruder body on a flat surface.
checklist.compliance_criterion: Worker places extruder body on flat surface with front face visibly pointing upward.

checklist.description: Allow lubricant to settle for 60 seconds.
checklist.compliance_criterion: Worker pauses all activity for a minimum of 60 seconds after lubricant application.
checklist.verifiability_notes: Validated deterministically by the Timing Engine from timestamps.
